response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 16+ years of broad software engineering experience and has held Staff-level roles, demonstrating genuine depth in distributed microservices, high-throughput systems, and polyglot development. However, the Principal Growth/Experimentation role demands deep, demonstrable ownership of experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, feature flagging, A/B test quality, and rollout-risk management — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. His strongest distributed-systems signal dates to 2018–2020 at Sociomantic, and there is no evidence of cross-team growth measurement systems, statistical or experimental analysis, or the IC6-caliber systemic impact the role requires.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed microservices experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Polyglot proficiency across TypeScript, C++, Java, C#, and DLang aligns with the required language stack
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer-tooling work at re:cinq signals platform-layer engineering instincts
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout automation
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis work anywhere in the career history
No indication of Principal/IC6-caliber cross-team systemic impact — growth strategy ownership, multi-workstream leadership, or large-scale stakeholder alignment

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
Distributed systems and high-throughput service experience
